rows.label: tlk45320392_03_msg0001
rows.name:
This is when the Divine Beast
weapons should be used, yet
we cannot even move them...

rows.label: tlk45320392_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Is this divine punishment
for trying to treat Divine
Beasts as weapons?

rows.label: tlk45320392_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I can see light from the heavens
starting to envelop us.

rows.label: tlk45320392_03_msg0004
rows.name:
So our fate ends here,
and we can only wait
for death[ML:Dash ]?
